message.content:
I need to add `<script src="/js/mobile-nav.js"></script>` to all HTML pages in ./public/ that use the dark-theme CSS (styles.css + dashboard.css). These pages need the mobile hamburger nav injected.

The pages that need this script added just before `</body>` are the ones that load styles.css and dashboard.css. I already checked and these are:
- dashboard.html
- job-board.html
- candidate-profile.html
- company-profile.html
- documents.html
- employee-payroll.html
- history.html
- interview-practice.html
- interview.html (uses interview.css instead of dashboard.css, but still dark theme with sidebar)
- job-create.html
- jobs.html
- omniscore.html
- onboarding.html
- payroll-dashboard.html
- payroll-run.html
- recruiter-analytics.html
- recruiter-applications.html
- recruiter-interviews.html
- recruiter-jobs.html
- recruiter-onboarding-ai.html
- recruiter-onboarding-docs.html
- recruiter-profile.html
- recruiter-trustscore.html
- skill-assessments.html
- candidate-onboarding-ai.html

Also add it to these pages that use styles.css without dashboard.css:
- assessment-results.html
- assessment-take.html
- interview-analysis.html
- video-interview.html
- admin-analytics.html

For each of these files in ./public/, check if mobile-nav.js is already included. If not, insert `<script src="/js/mobile-nav.js"></script>` on a new line just before `</body>`.

Also, for pages that have `styles.css` but NOT `responsive.css` in their head, add `<link rel="stylesheet" href="/css/responsive.css">` after the styles.css link. These pages are:
- admin-analytics.html
- assessment-results.html  
- assessment-take.html
- interview-analysis.html
- video-interview.html

Use sed carefully. Run the commands.

content.text: I'll start by checking which files already have mobile-nav.js and responsive.css, then make the necessary additions.

input.description: List HTML files in public directory

input.command: cd /tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-68136/hireloop/public && grep -l "mobile-nav.js" *.html 2>/dev/null || echo "NO FILES HAVE mobile-nav.js YET"
input.description: Check which files already have mobile-nav.js

input.command: cd /tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-68136/hireloop/public && for f in admin-analytics.html assessment-results.html assessment-take.html interview-analysis.html video-interview.html; do echo "=== $f ==="; grep -c "responsive.css" "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo "FILE NOT FOUND"; done
input.description: Check which of the 5 files already have responsive.css

content.content:
=== admin-analytics.html ===
0
FILE NOT FOUND
=== assessment-results.html ===
0
FILE NOT FOUND
=== assessment-take.html ===
0
FILE NOT FOUND
=== interview-analysis.html ===
0
FILE NOT FOUND
=== video-interview.html ===
0
FILE NOT FOUND

content.text: Good. No files have mobile-nav.js yet, and none of the 5 target files have responsive.css. Let me also check that the remaining files exist and verify they have `</body>`.

input.command: cd /tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-68136/hireloop/public && for f in dashboard.html job-board.html candidate-profile.html company-profile.html documents.html employee-payroll.html history.html interview-practice.html interview.html job-create.html jobs.html omniscore.html onboarding.html payroll-dashboard.html payroll-run.html recruiter-analytics.html recruiter-applications.html recruiter-interviews.html recruiter-jobs.html recruiter-onboarding-ai.html recruiter-onboarding-docs.html recruiter-profile.html recruiter-trustscore.html skill-assessments.html candidate-onboarding-ai.html assessment-results.html assessment-take.html interview-analysis.html video-interview.html admin-analytics.html; do if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then echo "MISSING: $f"; fi; done

input.description: Check specific files that might be missing

content.text: All files exist. Now I'll run the two operations: (1) add mobile-nav.js script before `</body>` in all 30 files, and (2) add responsive.css after styles.css in the 5 files that need it.

input.command: cd /tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-68136/hireloop/public && for f in dashboard.html job-board.html candidate-profile.html company-profile.html documents.html employee-payroll.html history.html interview-practice.html interview.html job-create.html jobs.html omniscore.html onboarding.html payroll-dashboard.html payroll-run.html recruiter-analytics.html recruiter-applications.html recruiter-interviews.html recruiter-jobs.html recruiter-onboarding-ai.html recruiter-onboarding-docs.html recruiter-profile.html recruiter-trustscore.html skill-assessments.html candidate-onboarding-ai.html assessment-results.html assessment-take.html interview-analysis.html video-interview.html admin-analytics.html; do sed -i 's|</body>|    <script src="/js/mobile-nav.js"></script>\n</body>|' "$f" && echo "OK: $f" || echo "FAIL: $f"; done
input.description: Insert mobile-nav.js script before closing body tag in all 30 files

content.content:
OK: dashboard.html
OK: job-board.html
OK: candidate-profile.html
OK: company-profile.html
OK: documents.html
OK: employee-payroll.html
OK: history.html
OK: interview-practice.html
OK: interview.html
OK: job-create.html
OK: jobs.html
OK: omniscore.html
OK: onboarding.html
OK: payroll-dashboard.html
OK: payroll-run.html
OK: recruiter-analytics.html
OK: recruiter-applications.html
OK: recruiter-interviews.html
OK: recruiter-jobs.html
OK: recruiter-onboarding-ai.html
OK: recruiter-onboarding-docs.html
OK: recruiter-profile.html
OK: recruiter-trustscore.html
OK: skill-assessments.html
OK: candidate-onboarding-ai.html
OK: assessment-results.html
OK: assessment-take.html
OK: interview-analysis.html
OK: video-interview.html
OK: admin-analytics.html

content.text: All 30 files updated with mobile-nav.js. Now add responsive.css to the 5 files that need it.

input.command: cd /tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-68136/hireloop/public && for f in admin-analytics.html assessment-results.html assessment-take.html interview-analysis.html video-interview.html; do sed -i 's|<link rel="stylesheet" href="/css/styles.css">|<link rel="stylesheet" href="/css/styles.css">\n    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/css/responsive.css">|' "$f" && echo "OK: $f" || echo "FAIL: $f"; done
input.description: Add responsive.css link after styles.css in the 5 target files

content.content:
OK: admin-analytics.html
OK: assessment-results.html
OK: assessment-take.html
OK: interview-analysis.html
OK: video-interview.html

content.text: Now let me verify both changes were applied correctly.

input.command: cd /tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-68136/hireloop/public && echo "=== Files with mobile-nav.js ===" && grep -l "mobile-nav.js" *.html | wc -l && echo "" && echo "=== Verifying mobile-nav.js placement (sample) ===" && for f in dashboard.html admin-analytics.html video-interview.html; do echo "--- $f ---"; grep -n -A1 "mobile-nav" "$f"; done
input.description: Verify mobile-nav.js was added to exactly 30 files and check placement

input.command: cd /tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-68136/hireloop/public && echo "=== Files with responsive.css ===" && for f in admin-analytics.html assessment-results.html assessment-take.html interview-analysis.html video-interview.html; do echo "--- $f ---"; grep -n "styles.css\|responsive.css" "$f"; done
input.description: Verify responsive.css was added after styles.css in the 5 files

content.text:
All changes have been applied successfully. Here is a summary:

**mobile-nav.js script injection** -- 30 files updated:
- `<script src="/js/mobile-nav.js"></script>` was inserted on a new line immediately before `</body>` in all 30 specified HTML files in `/tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-68136/hireloop/public/`.
- Files include: `dashboard.html`, `job-board.html`, `candidate-profile.html`, `company-profile.html`, `documents.html`, `employee-payroll.html`, `history.html`, `interview-practice.html`, `interview.html`, `job-create.html`, `jobs.html`, `omniscore.html`, `onboarding.html`, `payroll-dashboard.html`, `payroll-run.html`, `recruiter-analytics.html`, `recruiter-applications.html`, `recruiter-interviews.html`, `recruiter-jobs.html`, `recruiter-onboarding-ai.html`, `recruiter-onboarding-docs.html`, `recruiter-profile.html`, `recruiter-trustscore.html`, `skill-assessments.html`, `candidate-onboarding-ai.html`, `assessment-results.html`, `assessment-take.html`, `interview-analysis.html`, `video-interview.html`, `admin-analytics.html`.

**responsive.css link injection** -- 5 files updated:
- `<link rel="stylesheet" href="/css/responsive.css">` was inserted on the line immediately after the `styles.css` link in: `admin-analytics.html`, `assessment-results.html`, `assessment-take.html`, `interview-analysis.html`, `video-interview.html`.
